title: Placement Rules Catalog
description: Category x placement -> ratio-based placement rules. Top-level keys are garment categories (hoodie, tee, hat, mug, ...) plus the special '_defaults' key used as a fallback when a category-specific rule isn't defined.

width_ratio.description: Decoration width as a fraction of the detected garment bbox width.

x_center_ratio.description: Decoration center X position as a fraction of the garment bbox width (0 = left edge, 1 = right edge).

y_top_ratio.description: Decoration top Y position as a fraction of the garment bbox height (0 = top edge, 1 = bottom edge).

rotation_deg.description: Default rotation applied to the decoration, in degrees. Positive is clockwise.
